response.justification: The candidate demonstrates strong full-stack and infrastructure engineering skills with entrepreneurial experience, but lacks the depth of AI/ML expertise and direct leadership at the Principal/Director level required for this role. Their background in scalable systems and open-source contributions is relevant, though the focus on AI strategy is limited.
strengths: Diverse technical experience across web, mobile, desktop, and embedded systems
Hands-on experience with cloud and infrastructure (AWS, Kubernetes, high-throughput systems)
concerns: No advanced degree in AI/ML or demonstrated expertise in AI-powered product development
Seniority below Director-level IC (current title is Staff/Senior Software Developer)
Limited evidence of strategic leadership in AI/cloud platform innovation
